visual_description: Two men in white shirts and black ties are sitting next to each other in an office. The man on the left, who appears to be a police officer based on his uniform, is speaking and looking towards the other man. The man on the right is looking down, seemingly focused on something out of frame.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in a calm, conversational tone. The audio is clear and the speech is easily understandable.
